tech_news.description: A minor content update is on the way for Marvel Rivals this week. Check out the Marvel Rivals patch notes for May 21 update here.

tech_news.title: Imaging hidden objects with consumer LiDAR via motion-induced sampling - Nature
tech_news.description: Researchers enable hidden-object imaging on consumer LiDAR by fusing multiple frames with a motion-based model, achieving three-dimensional reconstruction, tracking and localization using low-cost, off-the-shelf smartphone sensors.

tech_news.title: De novo design of quasisymmetric two-component protein cages - Nature
tech_news.description: Researchers designed two-component proteins forming quasisymmetric cages via geometric frustration, enabling tunable virus-like assemblies for cargo delivery, cellular uptake and studying intracellular diffusion and protein localization.

tech_news.title: Neural representation of action symbols in primate frontal cortex - Nature
tech_news.description: A drawing-like task designed to study compositional generalization identifies a specific neural population in the ventral premotor cortex in primates that encodes action symbols.

tech_news.title: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say? - The Verge
